title: vendor github.com/json-iterator/go@v1.1.12
body:
Fix a runtime segfault when being compiled with recent versions of Go.

Fixes: https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2079759
Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <vrothberg@redhat.com>

@TomSweeneyRedHat @baude @mtrmac PTAL

comments.body:
> This is going to effectively disappear after updating to a new c/storage, isn’t it?

I think so yes.

> This is going to effectively disappear after updating to a new c/storage, isn’t it?

Oh, this is actually on an older backports branch…
